elements.title: € 900.000 Homestead 3 bedrooms Alfaçal Aljezur - electricity, terrace, equipped, kitchen, cork oaks, water (Provenda)
elements.contents: SaleSítio de Paz is a rare and authentic Algarve estate, just 8 km from the beach, with a main house in taipa of about 144sqm, semi-detached, an independent accommodation unit, three warehouses with development potential and an orchard of fig and pomegranate trees, vegetable garden, pine and cork trees. With connections to public networks, fiber optic internet and infrastructure for horses, just five minutes from Aljezur, this is a truly special property for those seeking space, nature and tranquility. Hidden among the serene nature of the Alentejo-Algarve coast, the Sítio de Paz property represents a truly rare opportunity: an authentic retreat, just 8 km from the beaches and amenities of the neighboring villages, where privacy, tranquility and natural beauty coexist in perfect harmony. It is built according to the ancestral technique of the taipa, compacted clay that guarantees natural isolation and an atmosphere of freshness in summer and coziness in winter. With a living area of 144sqm, the main house offers a cozy interior organized around an open plan kitchen and living room, three bedrooms and a bathroom. The roof has been recently renovated with cork insulation and the window frames have also been replaced, ensuring maximum comfort without compromising the original character of the building. The privileged viewpoint of this house offers stunning and unobstructed views over the surrounding rural landscape, a spectacle that renews itself every hour of the day. Complementing the main house, there is an independent accommodation unit, designed to ensure total autonomy and privacy. With an equipped kitchen, living and sleeping area, bathroom and a mezzanine with additional accommodation capacity, this space opens directly to a private terrace through French glass doors. Ideal for receiving family and friends, exploring the potential of local accommodation, or simply offering independence to those who want to reside in the same space autonomously. The land surrounding the property is one of its most charming assets. An orchard with fig and pomegranate trees invites to harvest in the warmer months and a small garden offers the possibility of growing your own food, reinforcing the spirit of rural life and self-sufficiency. The land also has pines and cork trees, emblematic trees of the Algarve landscape that give shade, charm and a truly special natural setting to the property. The property also has three warehouses (approximately 85sqm, 21sqm and 16sqm, respectively), which offer multiple possibilities of use: storage, workshop, stables or spaces to be converted, subject to the appropriate licenses. There is even infrastructure already installed for horses, which opens doors to equestrian tourism projects or outdoor activities. With regard to utilities, the property has water and electricity from the municipal network, fiber optic internet and private parking, a combination that combines rural charm with contemporary convenience. Possibility of expanding the areas up to 300sqm for housing and 600sqm for Rural Tourism. Just 5 minutes from Aljezur, Rogil and Amoreira Beach, Sítio de Paz is situated in a perfect balance: close to everything that is essential, but completely surrounded by natural landscape, the silence is deep, the views reach the horizon in all directions and the feeling of being truly out of the world is a constant. Whether as a permanent family residence, retreat, rural tourism project or long-term investment, Sítio de Paz is one of those properties that rarely appear on the market, for those looking for space, authenticity and the genuine Algarve lifestyle, this is simply an opportunity that does not repeat itself.

elements.title: € 890.000 Farm 3 bedrooms Bordeira Aljezur - furnished, alarm, equipped, terrace, fireplace, store room (Provenda)
elements.contents: SaleProperty consisting of three bedrooms, two bathrooms, cozy living room, functional kitchen and fireplace. It is furnished and equipped with underfloor heating, alarm system and storage. Outside it has a well-kept garden area, terrace, pergola and dining area, ideal for leisure moments. The property also includes a small ruin with potential for reconstruction, offering an additional opportunity for valorization. This house was completely rebuilt by an interior architect, designed with a focus on comfort, simplicity and a welcoming atmosphere, creating a space where the rhythm of life becomes naturally calmer and more harmonious.

elements.title: € 345.000 House 1 bedrooms Bordeira Aljezur (Provenda)
elements.contents: SaleThis house combines authentic Algarve charm with a modern, relaxed touch. Completely rebuilt, the property is spread over three floors connected by a stone staircase and features whitewashed interiors, custom-made wooden furniture and natural textiles that create a serene and bright atmosphere. With a bedroom, a bathroom and a living room, a fully equipped kitchen and a patio facing the street, it is the perfect refuge for those who appreciate the simplicity of village life. Here, time slows down and every detail invites you to relax. Just 10 minutes from the wild beaches of the Costa Vicentina, such as Praia da Bordeira and Carrapateira. Close to Aljezur and around 30 km from Sagres and Lagos, it offers the perfect balance between rural tranquility and easy access to the coast.

It is easily accessible, with private path, parking zone, terraces and pérgulas, providing various leisure zones. House in a position to be inhabited, with equipped kitchen, heating, air conditioning, electricity and water from the network and borehole. Possibility of expanding the construction area.

elements.title: € 545.000 Farm Corte de Sobro Rogil Aljezur - electricity, water (Provenda)
elements.contents: SaleLocated on the Vicentina coast, with a total area of 7.09 hectares, it includes an old housing, a natural lake, a pond, panoramic views of the sea and the saw, just 4.5 km from Rogil, 7 km from Aljezur and 8 km from the beach. Electricity and water supply network are available on site, ensuring all essential conditions for housing or project development. The existing house has an implementation area of 195.8sqm and a useful area of 140.31sqm. There is a possibility of renewing, expansion or construction of a rural tourism project up to 2000sqm. With great agricultural potential is an opportunity to create a quiet refuge, a sustainable project or a lucrative rural business, this property offers what you are looking for!

elements.title: € 369.000 Farm Barranco da Figueira Aljezur - well, water, tank, cork oaks (Provenda)
elements.contents: SaleDiscover a unique 65-hectare property in the Costa Vicentina Natural Park, just 10 minutes from Aljezur, featuring landscapes of valleys and hills covered with native cork oak and strawberry trees, abundant water resources (two wells, a stream, and a water tank), and a 55.5 m² ruin with approved plans for reconstruction. Equipped with a 6 kW solar system it offers energy independence and is ideal for agroforestry, permaculture projects, or as a private retreat, combining privacy, sustainability, and proximity to the beaches and the town.

elements.title: € 560.000 House in the countryside 3 bedrooms Valinhos Aljezur - equipped kitchen, garden, barbecue (Provenda)
elements.contents: SaleT3 housing of traditional construction in mud, rehabilitated and in good condition. Fully furnished and ready to live, it is very close to the city center. Just 15 minutes from the beach, it offers the perfect balance between country life and access to all urban amenities. It has three bedrooms with private bathroom plus an additional supporting house, living room and kitchen equipped in open plane, pantry and tidy living room, garden, porch, barbecue, fruit trees, 4 garages, two holes, connection to the water network and electricity.

elements.title: € 420.000 Farm Aljezur - cork oaks, arable crop, water (Provenda)
elements.contents: Sale3.16 hectare property located 3 km from the center of Aljezur and 7 km from the beaches. It has a construction area of 120sqm corresponding to an old house for reconstruction, classified as a legal ruin, thus offering several possibilities for renovation. The land is of mixed nature, with areas of arable culture and cork oaks. It has easy road access, connection to the electricity grid and on-site water supply. Ideal for those who want to develop a residential project, in an area with great potential.

elements.title: € 70.000 Land with 59000sqm Aljezur - cork oaks, electricity, water (Provenda)

elements.title: € 550.000 Hotel Aljezur - laundry (Provenda)
elements.contents: SaleLocated in a beautiful area with easy access, approximately 8 km from Aljezur, this property is ideal for a nature retreat. It has prior approval for the construction of a resort-style hotel with dispersed units, comprising: 20 buildings, of which 15 are accommodation units/houses with a total area of ​​675sqm (45sqm/unit); 3 buildings for staff accommodation with a total area of ​​120sqm; 1 building for common areas and services with 400sqm; 1 building for laundry, technical area and storage with 150sqm. The project also includes a biological swimming pool, solar park and parking. Areas can be adjusted according to a new plan. The property has a wide variety of trees. Water is supplied via the public network and a borehole, and electricity and telecommunications are located close to the property. It is approximately 15 minutes from the beaches of Vale dos Homens and Amoreira, a 40-minute drive from Palmares Golf Course and approximately 90 minutes by car from Faro Airport.

elements.contents: Unbelievable property located in Alfambras with 4,3 hectares of pristine land- giving the feeling of walking in a public nature park. It contains  houses, the main house has additional 2 studios with separate entrances and shared kitchen.It can serve as a family house but it also has high investment potential  for retreats, weddings and so on…The main house has a area of 238m2 including the two studios. It has together 5 bedrooms, 3 of them en-suite and 2 with independent entrances/ studios.There is a full equipped open plan kitchen and living and dining rooms with stunning countryside views towards the pool and deck area.Outside leisure areas include jacuzzi, pool and sunbathing terrace with barbecue area with stunning views to the “nature park”.The house has economical underfloor heating and cooling, a Piazzetta wood burning stove and large windows for the views and lots of natural light.The second house has an area of 60m2 with an equipped kitchen, living room with fire place, bedroom and bathroom. It has been a successful rental property for years with AL license, heating and its own private pool and fire pit.The property has pine and cork forests and numerous fruit trees, mature olive and fig trees, also almond, loquat, quince, medronhos and palm trees.The house will be sold as it is, fully equipped on the highest quality standard.For touristic purposes its possible to build up to 600m2.Aljezur is about 10 minutes away. 5 t-beds6 t-baths3 t-kitchens € 2 250 000

elements.title: Moradia T3 Odeceixe € 380 000 (SW-Places)
elements.contents: Em Odeceixe, a 3km da praia, encontramos esta moradia de 2 pisos com área útil superior a 200m2 e um jardim com cerca de 100m2. Com entradas independentes para cada piso encontramos no 1º andar um T3 com acesso ao sótão e no rés-do-chão um amplo espaço a remodelar ambos com acesso ao quintal, esta pode ser a base que procura para habitação própria e alojamento.Agende a sua vista e não deixe passar esta oportunidade. 3 t-beds2 t-baths2 t-kitchens € 380 000

elements.title: Refúgio na Costa Vicentina € 300 000 (SW-Places)
elements.contents: Quintinha com 4,6 hectares perto de Odeceixe, com vista serra, excelente exposição solar e parte habitável (reabilitada com licença), a apenas 12 minutos da praia.Propriedade com 144 m² de construção, inserida em terreno maioritariamente plano e utilizável, com sobreiros, água e eletricidade da rede — ideal para viver, investir ou desenvolver projeto.Situada numa zona tranquila e reservada, esta quintinha oferece um verdadeiro refúgio na Costa Vicentina, combinando natureza, privacidade e proximidade ao mar.A habitação conta com cerca de 144 m², sendo que parte foi reabilitada em 2010 com autorização da Câmara Municipal e encontra-se atualmente habitável. Esta área dispõe de teto alto em madeira, um quarto, uma casa de banho e uma sala, permitindo utilização imediata.Existe ainda potencial para reabilitação ou ampliação da restante área, tornando esta propriedade especialmente interessante para quem procura viver no local enquanto desenvolve o seu projeto.O terreno, com aproximadamente 4,6 hectares, é maioritariamente plano e praticamente utilizável na sua totalidade, ideal para cultivo, lazer ou turismo rural. A presença de sobreiros confere identidade, valor e enquadramento natural à propriedade.Conta com água e eletricidade da rede, garantindo todas as condições essenciais para conforto e funcionalidade.Localizada a cerca de 12 minutos da praia de Odeceixe, uma das 7 Maravilhas de Portugal, e próxima das restantes praias da Costa Vicentina.Ideal para habitação própria, casa de férias ou investimento com elevado potencial. 1 t-kitchens2 t-beds1 t-baths € 300 000

elements.title: Fantástica Moradia T4 € 570 000 (SW-Places)
elements.contents: Numa das zonas mais tranquilas e procuradas da Urbanização Vale da Telha, em Aljezur, encontra esta espaçosa moradia T4 com excelentes áreas e grande potencial.Inserida num lote com cerca de 640 m2 e com aproximadamente 231 m² de área de construção distribuídos por dois pisos, esta moradia destaca-se pela luminosidade natural e pelas áreas generosas.A casa dispõe de quatro quartos com boas áreas, sendo um deles em suite com casa de banho privativa, e conta ainda com mais duas casas de banho. A sala de estar é ampla e luminosa, criando um ambiente confortável e acolhedor.A cozinha tem acesso directo ao exterior, onde se encontra uma agradável zona de barbecue, ideal para refeições ao ar livre e momentos de convívio.No exterior, o terreno oferece várias possibilidades de aproveitamento, seja para jardim ou zona de lazer. A moradia conta ainda com um terraço com vistas desafogadas, perfeito para relaxar e desfrutar da tranquilidade da envolvente.Outro destaque é a garagem de grandes dimensões, onde se encontra uma das casas de banho, com potencial para ginásio, zona de bem-estar ou outro espaço de lazer.Situada numa zona muito calma da Urbanização Vale da Telha, próxima da barragem, esta propriedade representa uma excelente oportunidade tanto para habitação própria como para investimento.Características principais:• Moradia T4• 231 m² de área de construção• Lote com cerca de 640 m²• 2 pisos• 3 casas de banho (1 em suite)• Sala ampla com excelente luminosidade natural• Cozinha com acesso directo ao exterior• Zona de barbecue• Terraço com vistas desafogadas• Garagem de grandes dimensões Marque já a sua visita 4 t-beds3 t-baths1 t-kitchens € 570 000

elements.title: Moradia T2 Odeceixe € 320 000 (SW-Places)
elements.contents: Moradia localizada na vila de Odeceixe com vistas deslumbrantes.Com uma área dew 57 m2 inserida num lote com 200 m2 esta moradia dispõe de 2 quartos, 1 casa de banho, 1 sala e 2 cozinhas , sendo uma delas chamada de cozinha de fogo.No quintal existe um pequeno jardim , um forno de lenha .Encontra-se situada numa zona bastante tranquila com vistas sobre Odeceixe, uma boa exposição solar.Próximo de vários serviços, nomeadamente, escolas, cafés centro de saúde etc.A praia de Odeceixe fica apenas a 3 quilómetros e a vila de Aljezur a 15 minutos de carro.Marque já a sua visita 1 t-baths2 t-kitchens2 t-beds € 320 000

elements.title: Apartamento T3+1 Odeceixe € 335 000 (SW-Places)
elements.contents: Apresentamos este belíssimo apartamento com 126m2 de área util distribuídos por 3 quartos um com casa de banho privativa, um escritório, cozinha com dispensa e marquise, uma sala com 29m2 e uma varanda com 28m2 com vistas sobre a Várzea e os montes alentejanos, tem o espaço ideal para o convivência de uma familia  e amigos em qualquer altura sobretudo nos dias mais quentes, tem ainda dois lugares de garagem privativos. Construído em 2007, encontra-se em bom estado de conservação  dispondo de ar condicionado, janelas com vidros duplos e cozinha equipada. Apenas a 3km de uma das mais belas praias de Portugal, este pode ser a habitação que tanto procurava. Contacte-nos para qualquer esclarecimento  e agende a sua visita. 1 t-kitchens3 t-beds2 t-baths € 335 000

elements.title: Moradia T2 Aljezur € 575 000 (SW-Places)
elements.contents: Moradia localizada no centro histórico de Aljezur composta por rés do chão e 1º andar .Com uma área coberta de 118 m2 esta moradia dispõe de 2 quartos, sala com lareira , cozinha equipada , 2 casas de banho.Painéis solares para aquecimento das águas .A moradia tem registo de Alojamento local.Próximos de vários pontos de interesse tais como; museus, castelo.As praias encontram-se apenas a 10 minutos de carro.Marque já a sua visita. 2 t-beds2 t-baths1 t-kitchens € 575 000
